final:
// // This submodule implements a demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
module top_mux_module(
    input [3:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    input sel,
    output reg [3:0] y);always @(*) begin
        if (sel) begin
            y <= b;
        end else begin
            y <= a;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This submodule implements a demultiplexer instead of a multiplexer.
